metrics.name: high_risk_exposure_ratio
metrics.formula: AVG(CASE WHEN severity = 'High' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)
metrics.description: The ratio of high-risk exposures to total exposures for each identity.

metrics.name: non_compliance_ratio
metrics.formula: AVG(CASE WHEN si.compliance_status = 'Non-Compliant' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)
metrics.description: Ratio of non-compliant licenses to total licenses.

metrics.name: exposure_score
metrics.formula: CASE WHEN COUNT(ie.exposure_id) > 0 THEN COUNT(ie.exposure_id) ELSE 0 END
metrics.description: Calculated score representing the number of exposures for an identity, used for dashboard visualizations.

metrics.name: exposure_score
metrics.description: Calculated exposure score as total usage hours per license.

dimensions.name: business_unit
dimensions.description: The business unit associated with the assets.

dimensions.name: department
dimensions.description: The department associated with the software assets.

dimensions.name: severity
dimensions.description: The severity level of the vulnerabilities, which categorizes them into different risk levels.

dimensions.description: The business unit responsible for the assets.

dimensions.name: environment
dimensions.description: The environment in which the assets are deployed (e.g., production, staging).

dimensions.name: os
dimensions.description: The operating system of the assets.

dimensions.name: software_stack
dimensions.description: The software stack associated with the assets.

dimensions.description: The business unit responsible for the exposure.

dimensions.description: The environment in which the exposure is categorized (e.g., production, staging).

dimensions.name: exposure_type
dimensions.description: The type of exposure (e.g., vulnerability, misconfiguration).

dimensions.name: environment
dimensions.description: The environment (e.g., production, staging) where the identity exposure occurred.

dimensions.description: Unique identifier for each asset.

dimensions.name: asset_name
dimensions.description: Name of the asset.

dimensions.description: Type of the asset (e.g., server, application, etc.).

dimensions.name: month
dimensions.description: Month of the performance trend analysis.

dimensions.description: Unique identifier for each identity being analyzed.

dimensions.description: The month for which the exposure data is aggregated.

dimensions.description: Name of the software.

dimensions.name: month
dimensions.description: The month for which the compliance data is reported.

dimensions.name: asset_id
dimensions.description: Unique identifier for each asset.

dimensions.name: identity_id
dimensions.description: Unique identifier for each identity whose exposure is being summarized.

dimensions.description: Unique identifier for each software in the inventory.

measures.name: total_vulnerabilities
measures.description: The total number of distinct vulnerabilities associated with the assets in the business unit.

measures.name: total_misconfigurations
measures.description: The total number of distinct misconfigurations associated with the assets in the business unit.

measures.description: The total number of distinct external exposures associated with the assets in the business unit.

measures.name: total_identity_exposures
measures.description: The total number of distinct identity exposures associated with the assets in the business unit.

measures.name: total_software_assets
measures.description: The total number of distinct software assets in the department.

measures.name: total_licenses
measures.description: The total number of licenses for software assets in the department.

measures.name: avg_usage_hours
measures.description: The average usage hours of software assets in the department.

measures.name: total_vulnerabilities
measures.description: The total number of vulnerabilities recorded for each severity level.

measures.name: avg_time_to_remediate
measures.description: The average time taken to remediate vulnerabilities, calculated by averaging the time_to_remediate values.

measures.description: The total number of distinct assets.

measures.description: The total number of distinct vulnerabilities associated with the assets.
